WHOOGLE_USER.description: Basic auth username. Authentication is enabled by default; leave empty to disable.

WHOOGLE_PASS.description: Basic auth password. Auto-generated. Set alongside WHOOGLE_USER to enable authentication.

WHOOGLE_CONFIG_THEME.description: UI theme: light, dark, or system.

WHOOGLE_CONFIG_LANGUAGE.description: Interface language (e.g., en, ja, es). English is the default.

WHOOGLE_CONFIG_SAFE.description: Enable safe search: 1 for enabled, 0 for disabled.

WHOOGLE_CONFIG_TOR.description: Route searches through Tor: 1 for enabled, 0 for disabled.
